title: There Is a Light That Never Goes Out
meaning_summary: Its emotional clarity and cult-level familiarity make it one of the most durable songs in the Smiths catalog.
revenue_drivers: Indie and alternative playlists support steady long-tail streaming.
Deep fan replay and cultural recognition keep the song visible.
Its strong identity helps it endure across generations of discovery.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: There Is a Light That Never Goes Out is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
